title: Venezuelan Tofu Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful soup originating from Venezuela, made with tender tofu and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlicky venezuelan soup mix and cook for 1 minute.
Add the juicy tomatoes, tofu, and water to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season the soup with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
